content: Los Pinos is the southernmost peak above 4,000 feet 1,200 m in the Santa Anas, and provides extensive views south towards San Diego and the Pacific Ocean as well as views on clear days of the San Jacinto Mountains and San Bernardino Mountains in the east
summary: Los Pinos is the southernmost peak above 4,000 feet 1,200 m in the Santa Anas, and provides extensive views south towards San Diego and the Pacific Ocean as well as views on clear days of the San Jacinto Mountains and San Bernardino Mountains in the east
